annotation_target.structure: Second theme consequent — G major cadential approach
teaching_goals: feel the G major cadence as a local tonic — satisfying but temporary
the exposition will repeat or develop
style_tips: clean cadence — no ritardando unless marked
the G major arrival is elegant

teaching_notes.note: G major tonic arrival — elegant and clean, as the Classical style demands.
technique: slight emphasis on the G tonic

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 21–24 of Piano Sonata No. 16 in C Major, K. 545, I. Allegro (continuation of mm. 17–20), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 21–24 and describe the continuation.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 21–24.
Measures 21–24 extend the second theme — the G major area continues with Mozart's characteristic elegance. The phrase closes toward a cadential gesture. Let me loop mm. 21–24.
Mozart K545 mm. 21–24: second theme G major extension, cadential approach. Pairs with mm. 17–20.

eval_metadata.split_strategy: stratified by (composer, composition_id) with MIDI byte-hash dedup
